examples.title: Dashboard — KPI row + spark + wide tile
examples.code:
<Bento Columns="3" Gap="Bento.BentoGap.Md">
    <KpiCard Label="Revenue" Value="$48,290" Delta="12.3" />
    <KpiCard Label="Active users" Value="12,402" Delta="4.8" />
    <KpiCard Label="MRR" Value="$9,820" Delta="-1.2" />
</Bento>
<Bento Columns="3" Gap="Bento.BentoGap.Md">
    <SparkCard Label="Page views" Value="184k" Data="@sparkA" />
    <SparkCard Label="Signups" Value="421" Data="@sparkB" />
    <BentoTile Title="Traffic" Description="Last 7 days">
        <Chart ... />
    </BentoTile>
</Bento>

mdSummary:
# Bento

Masonry grid for dashboard tiles and marketing feature layouts.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Dashboard
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/bento

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Bento | Columns | `int` | `4` |  |
| Bento | Gap | `BentoGap` | `BentoGap.Md` |  |
| Bento | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Bento | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Bento | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| BentoTile | Span | `int` | `1` |  |
| BentoTile | RowSpan | `int` | `1` |  |
| BentoTile | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| BentoTile | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| BentoTile | HeaderContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| BentoTile | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| BentoTile | FooterContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| BentoTile | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| BentoTile | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Bento) — RenderFragment slot
- `HeaderContent` (BentoTile) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (BentoTile) — RenderFragment slot
- `FooterContent` (BentoTile) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `BentoTile`

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Bento />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-card-foreground`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Bento/Bento.razor`
- `UI/Bento/BentoTile.razor`
